narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: नतीजा यह है कि यूक्रेन नाटो-रूस सैन्य लड़ाई के लिए युद्ध का मैदान बन गया है।
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote frames the war as a 'NATO-Russia military battle' for which Ukraine has become the 'battleground'. This actively shifts the focus and implied responsibility away from Russia's invasion and onto a conflict between NATO and Russia, thereby blaming the war on the broader geopolitical tension rather than the invader.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: रूस शीत युद्ध की लौ जलाने के लिए अमेरिकी-प्रभुत्व वाले सैन्य गठबंधन का परीक्षण करता रहा।
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement portrays NATO as an 'American-dominated military alliance' that is being 'tested' by Russia to reignite the Cold War. This language criticizes and discredits the Western alliance by framing it as a provocative, hegemonic force responsible for rekindling old conflicts.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: नतीजा यह है कि यूक्रेन नाटो-रूस सैन्य लड़ाई के लिए युद्ध का मैदान बन गया है।
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote frames the war in Ukraine as a battlefield for a 'NATO-Russia military fight', implicitly shifting the cause of the conflict away from Russia's invasion and onto a broader geopolitical struggle involving NATO, thereby blaming others (NATO) for the war.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: रूस शीत युद्ध की लौ जलाने के लिए अमेरिकी-प्रभुत्व वाले सैन्य गठबंधन का परीक्षण करता रहा।
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement portrays NATO, a Western military alliance, as 'American-dominated' and implies it is being tested by Russia to reignite the Cold War, which criticizes and discredits the nature and role of the Western alliance.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: नतीजा यह है कि यूक्रेन नाटो-रूस सैन्य लड़ाई के लिए युद्ध का मैदान बन गया है।
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote frames the war as a 'NATO-Russia military battle' for which Ukraine has become the 'battleground'. This actively shifts the focus and implied responsibility away from Russia's invasion and onto a conflict between NATO and Russia, thereby blaming the war on others (NATO's expansion/actions) rather than the invader (Russia).

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: रूस शीत युद्ध की लौ जलाने के लिए अमेरिकी-प्रभुत्व वाले सैन्य गठबंधन का परीक्षण करता रहा।
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement portrays NATO as an 'American-dominated military alliance' that is testing Russia and reigniting the flames of the Cold War. It criticizes the West/NATO by suggesting it is an aggressive, hegemonic force provoking conflict, which aligns with discrediting Western alliances and diplomacy.
